name: OpenIPAHound 01 Path - Host Admin
description: Finds users or groups that can reach a host with both modeled SSH and sudo access. Use the returned principals and hosts in BloodHound Pathfinding, then validate host login and sudo behavior in the target environment.
query:
MATCH membership=(principal)-[:IPA_MemberOf*0..3]->(access_scope)
WHERE (principal:IPA_User OR principal:IPA_Group)
  AND (access_scope:IPA_User OR access_scope:IPA_Group)
MATCH ssh_path=(access_scope)-[ssh:IPA_CanSSH]->(host:IPA_Computer)
MATCH sudo_path=(access_scope)-[sudo:IPA_CanSUDO]->(host)
RETURN membership, ssh_path, sudo_path,
       coalesce(principal.uid, principal.cn) AS principal_name,
       coalesce(access_scope.uid, access_scope.cn) AS access_scope_name,
       host.fqdn AS host_fqdn,
       ssh.hbacrule AS hbac_rule,
       sudo.sudorule AS sudo_rule,
       sudo.nopassword AS sudo_nopassword
LIMIT 1000
